action.reasoning: Observation: local TTA validation failed because newer model code added a projection head, while older checkpoints do not contain proj.* weights. Analysis: this is a backward-compatibility issue in checkpoint loading, not a modeling failure. We need robust non-strict loading for optional projection layers in validate/predict, then measure whether TTA helps on source val before deciding on another eval. Decision: make checkpoint loading backward-compatible, finish predict.py cleanly, run local validation sweep for none/flip/sketch/all on the current best checkpoint, and use the results to choose the next submission.
action.command: python validate.py --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline_aug/best.pt --tta_mode none && python validate.py --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline_aug/best.pt --tta_mode flip && python validate.py --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline_aug/best.pt --tta_mode sketch && python validate.py --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline_aug/best.pt --tta_mode all
